query:
SELECT id, customerName, contractStartDate, contractType, arrUsd, onboardingFeePaid, aeId 
FROM deals 
WHERE customerName IN ('Recknagel', 'Machine Tool Engineering', 'C-Axis', 'Apollo')
ORDER BY customerName
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT id, customerName, contractStartDate, contractType, arrUsd, onboardingFeePaid, aeId 
FROM deals 
WHERE customerName IN ('Recknagel', 'Machine Tool Engineering', 'C-Axis', 'Apollo')
ORDER BY customerName
